adds.rationale: BOTZ is the most liquid US-listed robotics ETF and gives clean exposure to the profile's robotics next-wave at a time when H1 2022 growth-stock weakness has compressed its price — an attractive early-accumulation entry.

news_evidence.summary: Global X 497K confirms BOTZ tracks the Indxx Global Robotics & AI Thematic Index across industrial robotics/automation, drones, AI, and non-industrial robotics (Jan 31, 2022 reconstitution).

adds.rationale: Rocket Lab is the only liquid US-listed pure-play small-launch provider, showing concrete H1 2022 momentum via the $143M MDA/Globalstar spacecraft contract and 124% YoY Q1 revenue growth — firmly in the buildup phase of the rockets/spacecraft wave.

news_evidence.summary: Rocket Lab selected by MDA to build 17 spacecraft buses for Globalstar's LEO constellation; initial contract $143M with options for nine more.
Rocket Lab Q1 FY2022: revenue $40.7M (+124% YoY); Space Systems +1,873% YoY; Q2 guidance $51-54M.

adds.rationale: The 2022 NATO Madrid Summit (June 29-30, on the rebalance date) locked in a structural multi-year increase in allied defense budgets — the clearest near-term catalyst for the profile's geopolitical-rearmament wave; ITA is the most liquid broad US defense ETF to capture it.

news_evidence.summary: White House Madrid Summit fact sheet: 2022 is the eighth straight year of rising non-US allied defense spending; new US force posture in Poland, UK, Italy, Germany — cementing multi-year rearmament.
NATO 2022 Strategic Concept adopted at Madrid; allies submit updated spending plans under the 2% GDP pledge, a durable demand signal for ITA's defense holdings (LMT, NOC, RTX).

rationale_overall: The starter watchlist is heavily concentrated in the current AI wave. This rebalance fills three next-wave slots: BOTZ for robotics (early-accumulation after H1 2022 growth-stock compression), RKLB for rockets/spacecraft (clear revenue ramp and the landmark MDA/Globalstar contract), and ITA for geopolitical-rearmament (the NATO Madrid Summit on the rebalance date locked in multi-year allied defense-budget expansion). Quantum (IONQ/RGTI) and nuclear (SMR, only ~58 days of price history) are deferred to Q3 2022 when the optimizer will have more data. Post-change watchlist reaches the 8-cap with no removals.
